# Colony Ship Manifest Update: INS Prometheus (Corrected)

This notice supersedes the previous manifest report for the INS Prometheus.

Passenger capacity has been revised to 12,000 settlers. The original figure of 10,000 was based on the initial design specifications, but the retrofit of Deck 7 through Deck 9 with high-density cryogenic pods added 2,000 additional berths. The updated manifest was filed after the engineering review completed.

Additionally, the transit time via the Alpha-7 corridor has been revised downward to 2.8 standard years, following the discovery of a gravitational slingshot maneuver around the Vega transit point that was not available during the original route planning.

All other specifications from the original manifest remain accurate.
